query: Give me a 360 view of this salesforce account: supplier1 : open opportunities, any SmartSales locations for that account, and any emails I have about that company.
reasoning: To provide a comprehensive view of the account 'supplier1', I will first gather open opportunities associated with the account from Salesforce and the associated locations from SmartSales. Then, I will fetch any relevant emails from the Graph agent. Both queries can proceed in parallel since they do not depend on one another.

steps.task: Retrieve all open opportunities for the Salesforce account named 'supplier1'.
Get any SmartSales locations associated with the account 'supplier1'.
Collect all emails related to the company 'supplier1'.

synthesis: Combine the results of steps 1, 2, and 3 to provide a 360 view of the Salesforce account 'supplier1'.
